title: Page printer
content: A page printer is a computer printer which processes and prints a, whole page at a time, as opposed to printers which print one line or character at a time such as line printer s and dot-matrix printer s. Page printers are often all incorrectly termed “laser printers” —although virtually all laser printers are page printers, other page printing technologies also exist Components. The components of a page printer are: Page printing technologies. There are several page printing technologies, for example:
